creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here's an up-to-date version of the patch I've been running for months 
without issue.

Ultimately, I don't care all that much at this point whether or not it 
makes it in because I'll continue to maintain the patch [in my private 
svn copy], but I figured that someone else might like to have it as it 
allows people to manage winbind independent of smbd/nmbd, as the wrapper 
in FreeNAS now appears to hack around this limitation.

/usr/local/etc/rc.d/samba (the convenience wrapper rc script) is removed, 
but compatibility is maintained in the other modularized rc scripts, so 
this needs to be documented (or at bare minimum replaced with a 
non-rc-script).

Thanks,
-Garrett
